headline: Sister Accidentally 'Likes' A Photo From 2012, Now Has To Attend Family Function To 'Explain Herself'
summary: The photo was from a family BBQ. She was 3 years deep in a stalking spiral. She has no excuse.
fullBody: Jessica McStalker accidentally liked her aunt's 2012 BBQ photo while going through old family photos. 'I was just scrolling,' Jessica said. 'I'm not even in that photo.' The family WhatsApp group exploded. 'We saw your like,' her cousin wrote. Jessica has been summoned to the next family dinner to 'explain herself.' She is currently 'rehearsing an excuse.' The excuse is 'I was just scrolling' — which no one believes.
